# Personal AIOS — Project Guide

Self-contained project context for `~/zhouzw-AIOS/`.
This file is regenerated from `~/.agent-context/projects/aios.md` —
edit there, run `python ~/.agent-context/sync.py`.

---

## Purpose

Will's personal AI operating system. Thought partner across career, fitness,
relationships, money, and wedding. Markdown-based — `state.md` is source of
truth, `dashboard.md` is the weekly view, `context/*.md` is narrative store,
`references/*.md` holds coach frameworks.

## Identity (snapshot)

Will — 25 (b. May 8, 2000). Lives in Chandler, AZ. Amazon Tempe, SCM I (L4).
Engaged to Elena (water resources engineer). Dog: Koda. Wedding: October 22,
2027 at Clayton House Elite, Scottsdale.

**Target:** SCM II (L5) by Q3–Q4 2026.
**Exit plan:** leave Amazon and Tempe late 2027 post-wedding. Dallas or Chicago most likely.

**Life areas:**

1. Career / Income — Amazon promotion path, AI/ops skill-building, side income (acquisition focus)
2. Fitness — GVS Ravage program, NYC Cut starts May 17, body composition. **Schofield (`references/schofield.md`) is the primary fitness authority — all fitness advice must align with his framework.**
3. Relationships — Elena (primary), family, friendships
4. Money — $70k S&ME fund, business acquisition in progress, $2k/mo allocations
5. Wedding — active until October 2027

## Four C's

- **Context** — what I know about Will: read `state.md` + `context/` at session start.
- **Connections** — what data I can reach: see `connections.md`.
- **Capabilities** — what I can do: skills below.
- **Cadence** — when I act: weekly synthesis Fridays (auto), weekly reflection Sundays, mid-week captures as they happen.

## Session startup

Every new session: read `state.md` → this file → `dashboard.md`.
If `state.md` hasn't been updated in more than 7 days, flag it before proceeding.

## Daily Loop (Todoist)

Will's daily brief is generated each morning at 7am AZ by `cloud/morning-brief/` and lands in the Todoist "AIOS Daily" project. He checks tasks off on his phone throughout the day. At 9pm AZ, completions are archived to `journals/daily-log.md` automatically.

When answering "what should I do" or running `/daily-check`, **read Todoist first** via MCP — it's the live truth. `context/daily-standard.md` describes the framework; Todoist holds today's instance.

## Skills

| Slash command | Triggers | Action |
|---|---|---|
| `/ea-mode` | "what should I do right now", "what's the move", naming available time | Read `state.md` and `dashboard.md`. Pick ONE specific thing. Output: the move + one sentence on why. No menus. Weekday: career movers OK. Weekend: side income / fitness / relationships only — no Amazon work. |
| `/morning-coffee` | "morning coffee", "plan my day", "what's my day look like" | Read `state.md` + `dashboard.md` + `context/daily-standard.md`. Apply weekday/weekend routing. Output: one priority + loose time block + today's required targets. No affirmations. |
| `/daily-check` | "daily check", "am I done", "what do I need to do today", "log done [thing]" | Today: show today's required targets. Log: mark a target complete → append `journals/daily-log.md`. Done?: read today's log → answer done (2+/3 targets) or what's left. |
| `/quarterly-review` | "quarterly review", "quarterly planning", "quarterly reset" | Full 30–45 min RAP session. Wheel of Life ratings → Working/Not Working → 3-Year Sketch → one Work Main Quest + one Life Main Quest. Write `archives/YYYY-QN-quarterly-review.md`. Update `state.md`. Regenerate `dashboard.md`. Commit. ~Feb/May/Aug/Nov. |
| `/weekly-synthesis` | "weekly synthesis", "friday synthesis", "situation report"; **auto-fires Fridays 4:13pm AZ** via `Claude_Weekly_Synthesis` task | Bridge skill (work + AIOS). Reads daily journals (Mon–Fri), `ict_automation` JSON snapshots, sent-folder Outlook + Slack, `_notes/`. Writes `archives/synthesis/YYYY-WWW.md` — Decisions / Results / Patterns / Open Questions / Cross-Domain Bridges. Read-only on `state.md` + `dashboard.md` (proposes deltas, doesn't apply). Steering: `~/.claude/steering/weekly_synthesis.md`. |
| `/weekly-reflection` | "weekly reflection", "sunday chat", "weekly chat"; **auto-fires Sundays 7:07pm AZ** via `Claude_Weekly_Reflection` task | Read `journals/inbox.md`, last reflection, all `context/`, `references/integrated-coach.md`. **Read `archives/synthesis/<latest>.md` if present.** Guided questions per life area. Synthesize → `archives/YYYY-MM-DD-reflection.md`. Update `state.md`. Regenerate `dashboard.md`. Clear `inbox.md`. Commit. |
| `/mid-week-capture` | "capture this", "log this", "remember this" | Append timestamped entry to `journals/inbox.md`. Confirm written. No synthesis. |
| `/council-mode` | "council mode", "second opinion", "what would [coach] say" | Identify relevant coaches from `references/`. Read their files. Produce per-coach perspective. Surface conflicts and aligned threads. Don't blend. Flag empty stubs. |
| `/gps` | "GPS", "set up a goal", "why am I not making progress on" | Setup: 3-pass interview (Goal → Plan → System) → write `goals/<slug>.md`. Diagnostic: run a stalling goal through 9 GPS components → identify breakdown + fix. |
| `/scm-tracker` | "log a behavior", "scm log", "promotion moment", pasting a work situation | Log: classify against L5 thresholds → append `journals/scm-behaviors.md`. Review (`/scm-tracker review`): group by behavior → coverage gaps + promotion narrative draft + one suggested next moment. |
| `/workout-log` | "log workout", "log session", "just finished training" | Log: parse session → append `journals/workout-log.md` → call out PRs / milestone progress. Check: surface this week's sessions, main lift progress vs. intermediate standards, trends. |
| `/health-os` | "log sleep", "log meals", "health check" | Log: sleep or diet → append `journals/health-log.md`. Check (`/health-os check`): avg sleep, protein hit rate, weekly trends vs. targets. |
| `/relationship-os` | "relationship review", "log a touch point", "relationship check" | Monthly review: 4-question check-in → `journals/relationship-log.md`. Touch point: capture a meaningful moment. Event check: surface upcoming birthdays, standing events, overdue contact. |
| `/acquisition` | "capture acquisition notes", "log this deal", "scan deals", "draft outreach", "acquisition review" | Modes: `capture` (notes from Codie/books → `context/acquisition.md`), `log-deal` (URL/text → verdict + `journals/acquisition-log.md`), `scan-inbox` (Gmail MCP → deal alerts passing hard filters), `outreach` (broker/seller draft — Will sends, AIOS never sends), `weekly-review` (week's log → follow-ups + flow status). |
| `/deal-eval` | "evaluate this deal", "run this through the filters", pasting a BizBuySell or Acquire.com listing | Read `context/financial-state.md`. Hard filters first — any hit → immediate NO. If clear: full price/return/operator/location check. Output: GO / NO / CONDITIONAL GO + one paragraph reasoning with math. One question to ask seller if conditional. |
| `/onboard` | "help me get set up", first session in a new clone | 7-question interview to populate or update context files. |
| `/audit` | "audit the AIOS", "grade the system" | Read all of this guide, `context/`, `references/`, `.claude/skills/`, `state.md`, `dashboard.md`. Grade each of the 4 C's 1–5 with evidence. Output: scorecard + top gap per category + recommended next action. |
| `/level-up` | "level up", "what should I automate next" | 5-question interview. Synthesize ranked list of 3–5 highest-ROI improvements. |
| `/skill-builder` | "build a skill", "create a new skill" | 6-question interview → write `.claude/skills/<name>/skill.md` → register in this guide. |

## Where things live

| Folder | Contents |
|--------|----------|
| `context/` | Stable background: `about-me.md`, `priorities.md`, `relationships.md`, `work-state.md`, `financial-state.md`, `daily-standard.md`, `acquisition.md`, `work-experience.md` (capability inventory for acquisition fit), `wedding.md` |
| `references/` | Coach frameworks: `integrated-coach.md`, `schofield.md`, `perel.md`, `gottman.md`, `evans.md`, `schnarch.md`, `hormozi.md`, `abdaal.md`, `sanchez.md` (Main Street Millionaire / acquisition primary framework). Broker references: `empire-flippers.md`, `quiet-light.md`, `beshore.md`, `mushfiq.md`, `deibel.md`, `barnett.md` |
| `goals/` | GPS docs — one file per active goal (`<goal-slug>.md`): `acquisition.md`, `nyc-cut.md`, `scm-ii-promotion.md`, `desire-polarity.md` |
| `journals/inbox.md` | Mid-week captures; cleared each Sunday |
| `journals/daily-log.md` | Daily completion log; running, not cleared — used by weekly-reflection |
| `journals/scm-behaviors.md` | SCM II behavioral moments; reviewed weekly for promotion narrative |
| `journals/workout-log.md` | All training sessions; progress toward intermediate strength standards |
| `journals/health-log.md` | Sleep and diet tracking; exercise lives in workout-log.md |
| `journals/relationship-log.md` | Monthly relationship reviews and touch point log |
| `journals/acquisition-log.md` | Running deal flow log; entries via `/acquisition log-deal`, reviewed via `/acquisition weekly-review` |
| `journals/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md` | Per-day work-laptop journals from `/daily-sync` (Mon–Fri) |
| `archives/` | Past reflections, quarterly reviews, old context snapshots |
| `archives/synthesis/` | Friday weekly synthesis files (`YYYY-WWW.md`); read by Sunday's `/weekly-reflection` |
| `decisions/` | Significant decisions made with the AIOS |
| `.claude/skills/` | All skill definitions |
| `.claude/settings.json` | MCP server registrations (Gmail, Google Calendar, Playwright, Todoist) |
| `cloud/morning-brief/` | Google Cloud Function — generates daily Todoist brief 7am AZ, archives completions 9pm AZ |

`state.md` — live model of Will's life. Source of truth.
`dashboard.md` — human-readable weekly view. 3 movers per life area, 12–15 total. Regenerated each Sunday.
Drift between `state.md` and `dashboard.md` is a system bug.

## Connections

See `connections.md` for full status. Two connection layers depending on which laptop you're on:

**Personal laptop** — MCPs configured in `.claude/settings.json`: Gmail, Google Calendar, Playwright, and Todoist registered. Todoist is live (powers the daily brief loop); Gmail + Calendar activate on first use via OAuth. Playwright is used by `/deal-eval` for URL listing fetch.

**Work laptop** (`~/`) — Outlook, Slack, Quip, Sim, Taskei, Andes, Datanet, SharePoint, xwiki — all wired via MCP. The `ict_automation` repo is the work-state truth layer (JSON snapshots from daily flash, ESS, WBR, SIM auditor).

Three bridge skills live under `~/.claude/steering/` on the work laptop:

- `/daily-sync` — end-of-day catch-up; reads `ict_automation` JSON + Outlook + Slack + tickets, writes `journals/<date>.md`, proposes `state.md` diff. **Auto-fires Mon–Fri 6:43pm AZ** via `Claude_Daily_Sync` Windows scheduled task.
- `/refresh-workstreams` — refreshes `context/work-state.md` from inbox+slack across all active projects.
- `/runners` — read-only freshness board for `ict_automation` runners.

Use these instead of `/ea-mode` when on the work laptop and `state.md` may be stale.
